title: 8 Herbal Teas For Brain Fog
description: Avena sativa teas contains compounds like ferulic acid, amines, and saponins, which have been found to positively impact brain function. Ferulic acid, in particular, has antioxidant properties that help protect the brain from free radicals and oxidative stress, a common cause of brain fog. Avena sativa also contains amines like N-hydroxyethylamine, which can cross the blood-brain barrier and stimulate neurotransmitter activity.
